query:
SELECT 
  u.email,
  t.id,
  t.description,
  t.amount,
  t.nature,
  t.date,
  DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(t.date/1000), '%d/%m/%Y') as data_formatada
FROM transactions t
JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE t.description LIKE '%Saldo%'
ORDER BY u.email, t.date DESC
LIMIT 20;
